'''H'gaard''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], one of "the Twins." It was covered in green ice.

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]''
